description: Remove dead code and fix non-booting services. (a) @quant/server (packages/server) is a full hand-rolled Express-like Router+middleware+auth with ZERO importers across the whole repo — it competes with the real @quant/server-core (146 importers) and misleads. (b) services/smtp-inbound has no entrypoint (src/index.ts is a barrel export only; nothing instantiates SmtpInboundServer; no start script). (c) services/ci-runner has no start/dev script and only creates a worker at import time.
steps: Confirm @quant/server has zero importers (grep '@quant/server\b' excluding @quant/server-core across apps/ services/ packages/). If confirmed, delete packages/server and remove it from pnpm-workspace coverage; regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml (pnpm install --lockfile-only) and verify --frozen-lockfile.
If any stray reference exists, repoint it to @quant/server-core before deleting.

services/smtp-inbound: add a real entrypoint (src/main.ts) that instantiates SmtpInboundServer from smtp-server.ts and calls listen(); add a `start` (node dist/main.js) and `dev` (tsx watch src/main.ts) script to package.json; keep src/index.ts as the library barrel.
services/ci-runner: add `start`/`dev` scripts and a proper main.ts bootstrap that creates the BullMQ worker inside a main() guarded by import.meta (not at module load); ensure graceful shutdown.
Add a minimal health endpoint/log line to both services so they are observably running.
Run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm typecheck, pnpm build.
acceptance_criteria: packages/server is deleted (or fully repointed) with no broken imports; lockfile consistent (--frozen-lockfile passes)
services/smtp-inbound has a runnable main.ts + start/dev scripts and boots the SMTP server
services/ci-runner has start/dev scripts and a guarded main() bootstrap
